parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Specifies a point or primitive group in the first input. If, for example, a group is specified containing the first and third points, then the first and third point of every input will be blended wher

parameters.name: diff
parameters.label: Differencing
parameters.description: Generates exaggerated blends between objects where values above 1 or less than 0 will result in over-scaled blends.

parameters.name: dopos
parameters.label: Blend Position
parameters.description: When checked, the point positions of the inputs will be blended based on the weights of the blend channels. If not checked, the input geometry will not change, only allowing Blending of Colors, Normal

parameters.name: doclr
parameters.label: Blend Colors
parameters.description: When checked, the point colors of the geometry inputs will be blended based on the weights of the blend channels.

parameters.name: donml
parameters.label: Blend Normals
parameters.description: When checked, the point normals of the geometry inputs will be blended based on the weights of the blend channels.

parameters.name: douvw
parameters.label: Blend Texture
parameters.description: When checked, the point texture co-ordinates of the geometry inputs will be blended based on the weights of the blend channels.

parameters.name: doup
parameters.label: Blend Up
parameters.description: When checked, the Up Vector of the geometry inputs will be blended based on the weights of the blend channels.

parameters.name: input0weight
parameters.label: Weight
parameters.description: The weight or contribution of this input. 0 has no contribution, 1 is full contribution.
